title: AO Ops Command System Registered
content: Arcanea Orchestrator (AO) registered as shared ops layer. Commands: status, handover, digest, cleanup, promote, plan, coach. Shared source: .arcanea/ops/commands/. Bootstrap: .arcanea/ops/AGENT_BOOTSTRAP.md. All agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode) configured with thin shims pointing to shared commands.
